node.title: Anyone received Uber Data Science Intern OA (Oct 8)? Resources or tips?

article.title: Anyone received Uber Data Science Intern OA (Oct 8)? Resources or tips?
article.content:
Hey everyone,

I just received an email from Uber regarding the Data Science Internship OA scheduled on October 8, 2025.

Just wanted to check — has anyone else received the OA invite for this position?
Also, if anyone has gone through a similar process before or has tips/resources for the Uber Data Science Intern test or interviews, it’d be great if you could share them here.

post.content: expect some easy to medium level dsa along with sql medium to hard level . but once your oa is done can you update the experience here ?
